title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 268.063 - Confidentiality of premises registration information
text:
268.063.  Confidentiality of premises registration information. — Any information related to premises registration shall be confidential information, to be shared with no one except state and federal animal health officials, and shall not be subject to subpoena or other compulsory production.
(L. 2005 S.B. 355)
